name: card-data-viz-line
title: CardDataVizLine
description: Canonical line-chart dashboard card with shared data-viz chrome, a filter action, fill chart region, and a static horizontal legend.

intent.summary: Canonical line-chart dashboard card with shared data-viz chrome, a filter action, fill chart region, and a static horizontal legend.
useWhen: A dashboard widget needs the standard line chart and visible series key in one data-viz card.
The legend identifies static line series and should not highlight or dim rows on hover.
avoidWhen: The visualization needs chart-to-legend hover synchronization or selectable series controls.
The product needs a custom legend treatment, supporting metrics, or an alternate chart layout.

alternatives.when: The line chart and legend need a custom layout without card chrome.
alternatives.reason: Compose ChartLine and a static ChartLegend directly in the product-owned layout.

alternatives.when: The visualization communicates parts of a total with synchronized slice emphasis.
alternatives.reason: CardDataVizDonut owns the donut layout and bidirectional hover synchronization.

accessibility: Provide a concise heading that identifies the trend and meaningful visible labels for every legend entry.
Keep essential series and value context available textually rather than relying on line color alone.
The card disables decorative legend-row hover; genuine legend links retain native link semantics and affordances.
states: The chart region fills the remaining card body while the legend remains content-sized.
The card disables local hover highlighting on a slotted ChartLegend because the line chart is static.
Chart and legend regions render only when their corresponding slots contain content, avoiding empty region spacing.
The owning product controls data, filtering, loading, empty, and error state; the card emits the filter action only.
responsiveBehavior: The selected sm, md, or lg shell size controls the card dimensions while the line chart shrinks within its chart region.
The horizontal legend wraps complete entries when the available width is constrained.
The parent dashboard owns card wrapping and breakpoint changes.

customElements: Assign series, categories, and legend items as JavaScript properties, then place the chart and legend in their named slots.
react: Keep filter and dataset state in the owner; pass the chart and legend with chart and legend slot attributes.
angular: Keep filter and dataset state in the owner; project the chart and legend into the chart and legend slots.

cardWidth.description: Card width token — also sets matching min-height.

heading.description: Widget heading shown in the card header.

events.name: dsFilterClick
events.description: Emits when the header filter control is activated.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
